messages.content: You are a concise assistant. Think if useful, then answer the user's question directly.
A user asks whether their laptop can charge from a 65W USB-C phone charger. Explain the likely answer, include one caveat, and keep the final answer under 120 words.
You are a careful assistant. Use reasoning to avoid mistakes, then give a short final answer.

Three services start at 09:00. Service A runs every 12 minutes, service B every 18 minutes, and service C every 30 minutes. After 09:00, when is the first time all three run at the same time again? Show the calculation briefly.
Return only valid JSON. Do not wrap the answer in markdown.
Extract this request into JSON with keys action, target, priority, and blockers: "Please migrate the registry metrics dashboard this week, but only after the staging scrape target is verified."
Answer clearly and stop when the answer is complete.
Give exactly three reasons why a small language model might repeat itself during generation. Use one sentence per reason and do not add more than three sentences.
You are a tool-using assistant. If a tool is needed, emit a single tool call and stop.
Check the local git working tree status. Use a safe command only.
You are a tool-using assistant. If current information is needed, emit a single tool call and stop.
Look up the latest public release notes for Qwen3.5 small models.
You are a tool-using assistant. Emit a single tool call with the needed calendar fields and stop.
Create a 30 minute meeting called Qwen benchmark review on 2026-06-14 at 10:00 with Alex and Priya.
You are a tool-using assistant. Emit a single tool call and stop.
Find the architecture advice process document in Google Drive. Prefer markdown or Google Docs results.
You are a tool-using assistant. Emit a single tool call and stop.
Inspect pull request 2444 in tetherto/qvac and list the failing checks.
You are a tool-using assistant. Emit a single tool call and stop.
Post a Slack update to #sdk-platforms saying: Qwen preset benchmark is ready for review.
You are a tool-using assistant. Emit a single tool call and stop.
Create an Asana task in QVAC SDK & Platforms called Investigate Qwen tool-call failures, due 2026-06-17, assigned to Maya.
You are a tool-using assistant. Emit a single tool call and stop.
Draft an email to qvac-team@example.com with subject Qwen benchmark summary and body mentioning the scaled preset report.
You are a tool-using assistant. Emit a single tool call and stop.
Append a row to spreadsheet Qwen Benchmark Results, sheet runs, with model qwen3.5-4b, preset qwen-nonthinking-general, score 100.
